title: STANLEY 8m/26ft Tylon Tape Measure with TRU-ZERO Anchor Hook, Retractable, High Visibility Tape Measure, 8m x 25mm, 0-30-656
features: PRECISION YOU CAN TRUST: Class II accuracy with an error tolerance of +/- 0.5mm at 1m, you can trust this tape to deliver precision every time. Also includes a sliding TRU-ZERO hook that adjusts for thickness, ensuring spot-on measurements inside and out.
8M/26FT REACH: Straight and strong reach for 8m/26ft for easy and accurate measurement on your own.
MEASURE WITH CONFIDENCE: Never miss a mark with the bright-yellow 25mm wide blade, ensuring high-visibility and easy readability of dual units (metric and imperial).

BUILT TO LAST: Enjoy double the blade life with a TYLON coating, offering x1.5 more abrasion resistance than standard lacquered blades, and an Armor coating on the first 80mm reducing blade breakage by 90%. Durable rubber casing to withstand the jobsite.
SECURE LOCKING: A secure slidelock allows the tape to lock in place, so you can focus on the task at hand. A powerful return allows you to move on without delay.
COMFORTABLE DESIGN: The durable rubber case with ergonomic grooves provides a comfortable slip-resistant grip, even during prolonged use.
COMPACT COMPANION: Lightweight and compact, keep your tape measure within reach and ready to go wherever work takes you.
TRUSTED BY GENERATIONS: Our tools have been the choice of tradespeople for over a century, delivering quality you can trust. Upgrade your tools to STANLEY for a job well done.
description: From the manufacturer The STANLEY 3m Tylon Tape Measure, 1-30-687, is packed with great features: CLASS II ACCURACY Achieve exact measurements with Class II accuracy (+/- 0.5mm error margin at 1m), ensuring every project meets professional standards TRU-ZERO HOOK The TRU-ZERO hook adjusts for thickness, delivering precise inner and outer measurements every time TYLON COATING Tylon blade coating offers superior abrasion resistance, keeping your tape measure reliable and ready for any task EXTENDED BLADE LIFE Built to endure, Armor coating on the first 80mm reduces breakage risk by 90% for long-lasting performance BUILT TO LAST A durable rubber casing and Tylon blade coating ensure this tape stands up to the toughest jobs COMFORTABLE DESIGN Ergonomic grooves provide a comfortable, slip-resistant grip letting you work longer and more efficiently SECURE LOCKING The improved SlideLock function keeps the blade firmly in place, so you can focus on precision COMPACT Lightweight and portable with integral belt clip, this tape measure is the perfect companion for professionals on the go
